name: ChatGPT
description: 通用 AI 助手，适合写作、问答、学习与头脑风暴。
descriptionEn: General AI assistant for writing, Q&A, learning, and brainstorming.

name: Claude
description: 长文本与总结表现优秀，适合文档处理。
descriptionEn: Excellent at long-context reading and summarization for document work.

name: Gemini
description: Google 的 AI 助手，支持多模态能力。
descriptionEn: Google AI assistant with multimodal capabilities.

name: Midjourney
description: 高质量 AI 绘图工具，风格化能力强。
descriptionEn: High-quality AI image generation with strong stylization.

name: Leonardo AI
description: 适合快速出图与风格尝试的绘图平台。
descriptionEn: Image platform for fast generation and style exploration.

name: Canva AI
description: 设计工具内置 AI 功能，适合海报与社媒图。
descriptionEn: Design platform with built-in AI, great for posters and social media graphics.

name: Runway
description: AI 视频生成与编辑，适合短视频创作。
descriptionEn: AI video generation and editing for short-form content.

name: Pika
description: 文本转视频工具，上手快、适合创意内容。
descriptionEn: Text-to-video tool that is easy to use for creative content.

name: CapCut
description: 剪映国际版，含多种 AI 视频功能。
descriptionEn: CapCut global edition with multiple AI video features.

name: GitHub Copilot
description: 代码补全与编程辅助，支持主流 IDE。
descriptionEn: Code completion and programming assistance for major IDEs.

name: Codeium
description: 免费的 AI 编程助手，支持多语言。
descriptionEn: Free AI coding assistant with multi-language support.

name: Replit AI
description: 在线开发平台 + AI 编程能力。
descriptionEn: Online development platform with AI coding capabilities.

name: Notion AI
description: 文档写作、总结与知识管理场景常用。
descriptionEn: Commonly used for writing, summarization, and knowledge management.

name: Grammarly
description: 英文写作润色与语法检查工具。
descriptionEn: English writing enhancement and grammar checking tool.

name: Tome
description: AI 生成演示文稿与提案内容。

name: Khanmigo
description: 学习辅导型 AI，适合学生与自学。
descriptionEn: Learning-focused AI tutor for students and self-learners.

name: Perplexity
description: AI 搜索与答案整合，适合快速查资料。
descriptionEn: AI search and answer synthesis for fast research.

name: Elicit
description: 面向研究与论文检索的 AI 工具。
descriptionEn: AI tool for research and academic paper discovery.
